'''鈭歞-b-z''' ('''kadabaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrasonificate|ultrasonificate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrasonificate|ultrasonificate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-b-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadabaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidabaz|thidabaz]] || [[word:jidabaz|jidabaz]] || [[word:shidabaz|shidabaz]] || [[word:kidabaz|kidabaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudabaz|thuthudabaz]] || [[word:jujudabaz|jujudabaz]] || [[word:shushudabaz|shushudabaz]] || [[word:kukudabaz|kukudabaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudabaz|thudabaz]] || [[word:judabaz|judabaz]] || [[word:shudabaz|shudabaz]] || [[word:kudabaz|kudabaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudabaz|thudabaz]] || [[word:judabaz|judabaz]] || [[word:shudabaz|shudabaz]] || [[word:kudabaz|kudabaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedabaz|thedabaz]] || [[word:jedabaz|jedabaz]] || [[word:shedabaz|shedabaz]] || [[word:kedabaz|kedabaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodabaz|thothodabaz]] || [[word:jojodabaz|jojodabaz]] || [[word:shoshodabaz|shoshodabaz]] || [[word:kokodabaz|kokodabaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodabaz|thodabaz]] || [[word:jodabaz|jodabaz]] || [[word:shodabaz|shodabaz]] || [[word:kodabaz|kodabaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodabaz|thodabaz]] || [[word:jodabaz|jodabaz]] || [[word:shodabaz|shodabaz]] || [[word:kodabaz|kodabaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]] || [[word:dabaz|dabaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dabaz|th忙dabaz]] || [[word:j忙dabaz|j忙dabaz]] || [[word:sh忙dabaz|sh忙dabaz]] || [[word:k忙dabaz|k忙dabaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadabaz|thathadabaz]] || [[word:jajadabaz|jajadabaz]] || [[word:shashadabaz|shashadabaz]] || [[word:kakadabaz|kakadabaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadabaz|thadabaz]] || [[word:jadabaz|jadabaz]] || [[word:shadabaz|shadabaz]] || [[word:kadabaz|kadabaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadabaz|thadabaz]] || [[word:jadabaz|jadabaz]] || [[word:shadabaz|shadabaz]] || [[word:kadabaz|kadabaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadabaz|shadabaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadabaz|goshadabaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadabaz|gokishadabaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadabazn眉|shadabazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadabaznkn眉|goshadabaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadabazn眉|gokishadabazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadabazsh毛|shadabazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadabaznksh毛|goshadabaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadabazsh毛|gokishadabazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadabazro|shadabazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadabaznkro|goshadabaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadabazro|gokishadabazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadabazmu|shadabazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadabaznkmu|goshadabaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadabazmu|gokishadabazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadabazsher|shadabazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadabaznksher|goshadabaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadabazsher|gokishadabazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadabazng|shadabazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadabaznkng|goshadabaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadabazng|gokishadabazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadabazya|shadabazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadabaznkya|goshadabaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadabazya|gokishadabazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadabazyam|shadabazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadabaznkyam|goshadabaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadabazyam|gokishadabazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadabazn眉sh毛|shadabazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadabaznkn眉sh毛|goshadabaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadabazn眉sh毛|gokishadabazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadabazn眉ro|shadabazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadabaznkn眉ro|goshadabaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadabazn眉ro|gokishadabazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadabazn眉mu|shadabazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadabaznkn眉mu|goshadabaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadabazn眉mu|gokishadabazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadabazsh毛n眉|shadabazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadabaznksh毛n眉|goshadabaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadabazsh毛n眉|gokishadabazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadabazsh毛ro|shadabazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadabaznksh毛ro|goshadabaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadabazsh毛ro|gokishadabazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadabazsh毛mu|shadabazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadabaznksh毛mu|goshadabaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadabazsh毛mu|gokishadabazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadabazron眉|shadabazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadabaznkron眉|goshadabaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadabazron眉|gokishadabazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadabazrosh毛|shadabazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadabaznkrosh毛|goshadabaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadabazrosh毛|gokishadabazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadabazromu|shadabazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadabaznkromu|goshadabaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadabazromu|gokishadabazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadabazmun眉|shadabazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadabaznkmun眉|goshadabaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadabazmun眉|gokishadabazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadabazmush毛|shadabazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadabaznkmush毛|goshadabaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadabazmush毛|gokishadabazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadabazmuro|shadabazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadabaznkmuro|goshadabaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadabazmuro|gokishadabazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
